story.title: Company Profile
story.p1: WearTac is a professional tactical apparel manufacturer specializing in tactical vests, protective helmets, tactical gloves, combat uniforms, and rescue clothing for military, police, and outdoor markets.
story.p2: With years of export experience and a fully owned production facility, we provide OEM/ODM services with strict quality control from raw material inspection to finished product delivery.
